summary: Implemented structured logging using Pino (dynamic pino-pretty in dev, raw JSON in staging/production), integrated request_id correlation using AsyncLocalStorage, configured custom Prometheus metrics under /metrics, and created alerts.yml for critical observability rules.
evidence: Vitest integration test suite passed 19/19 tests, verifying the /metrics endpoint, request correlation via X-Request-ID, and error logging.
Prometheus metrics verified to contain: http_requests_total, http_request_duration_seconds, active_requests.
YAML alerting rules created with HighErrorRate, HighLatency, and ServiceDown configurations.
